[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100000010 2
1 001011101 5
2 001110101 5
3 110101111 7
4 001011101 5
5 000110101 4
6 101100101 5
7 101010100 4

01 10 000100101 3
12 21 000001101 3
23 32 000010101 3

45 54 101000100 3
56 65 101000000 2
67 76 001001000 2
70 07 001010101 4

13 31 000100101 3
24 42 001000101 3
35 53 000010100 2
46 64 101000000 2
57 75 001010100 3
60 06 001000000 1
71 17 000001101 3

03 30 000110101 4 match 5
14 41 100100101 4
25 52 001010100 3
36 63 000000000 a
47 74 001000101 3
50 05 001010100 3
61 16 100001010 3
72 27 001011101 5 match 1 4

37 73 000010101 3
